---
title: "Welcome to the Interactive Dynamic Website Template"
description: "A demonstration of Quarto's interactive and dynamic capabilities"
---

## Introduction

This is a template for building **interactive, dynamic websites** using [Quarto](https://quarto.org). Quarto provides a powerful authoring framework that lets you combine text, code, and interactive visualizations into a single, reproducible document.

### What's Included

Explore the pages in this template to see different capabilities:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 📊 Data Visualization
Interactive charts and plots powered by Observable JS. [Explore →](data-viz.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### 🎛️ Interactive Widgets
Dynamic inputs, sliders, and reactive displays. [Explore →](widgets.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### ℹ️ About
Learn more about this template and how to customize it. [Explore →](about.qmd)
:::

:::

---

## Live Demo: Dynamic Counter

The following is a simple interactive element using Observable JS — no server required:

```{ojs}
viewof count = Inputs.range([0, 100], {
  label: "Choose a number",
  step: 1,
  value: 42
})
```

```{ojs}
html`<div class="callout callout-style-default callout-tip">
  <div class="callout-body">
    <p>You selected: <strong>${count}</strong></p>
    <p>Its square is: <strong>${count * count}</strong></p>
    <p>Its square root is: <strong>${Math.sqrt(count).toFixed(4)}</strong></p>
  </div>
</div>`
```

---

## Live Demo: Interactive Color Mixer

Mix colors interactively using sliders:

```{ojs}
viewof red = Inputs.range([0, 255], { label: "Red", step: 1, value: 100 })
viewof green = Inputs.range([0, 255], { label: "Green", step: 1, value: 149 })
viewof blue = Inputs.range([0, 255], { label: "Blue", step: 1, value: 237 })
```

```{ojs}
colorHex = `#${red.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${green.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${blue.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}`

html`<div style="
  background-color: ${colorHex};
  color: ${(red * 0.299 + green * 0.587 + blue * 0.114) > 128 ? '#000' : '#fff'};
  padding: 2rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-top: 1rem;
">
  ${colorHex.toUpperCase()}
  <br>
  <span style="font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: normal;">
    rgb(${red}, ${green}, ${blue})
  </span>
</div>`
```

---

## Getting Started

To use this template for your own project:

1. **Fork or clone** this repository
2. **Customize** the content in `.qmd` files
3. **Configure** `_quarto.yml` for your project settings
4. **Deploy** automatically to GitHub Pages via the included workflow

::: {.callout-tip}
## Quarto Resources
- [Quarto Documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/guide/)
- [Observable JS in Quarto](https://quarto.org/docs/interactive/ojs/)
- [GitHub Pages Deployment](https://quarto.org/docs/publishing/github-pages.html)
:::
